verses.text: All the children of the Lord shall praise Him, and gather together the truth of His faith.
And His children shall be known unto Him; therefore will we sing in His love.
We live in the Lord by His grace, and life do we receive in His Christ.
For a great day hath shone upon us, and marvellous is He who hath given us of His glory.

section: For the Father of Truth Remembered Me
